transcript.text:
I'm at a donkatsu (pork cutlet) restaurant that every Hangyang University students know about
It's been here for 40 years and it's very famous
[Everything from Hangwoon Donkatsu]
[Cheese oozing out...!]
[Have you ever heard of... egg and donkatsu?]
[This combination is a first]
Hello everyone
I'm here near Hangyang University
There's a donkatsu restaurant that every Hangyang University students know about
[Over here]
[Hangwoon Donkatsu] That's been here for 40 years
[Enters]
You can definitely feel the age of the restaurant
The menu...
There it is!
Kimchi fried rice! That looked really good

Let's order all the donkatsu
1 donkatsu, 1 fish katsu,
1 sweet potato donkatsu, 1 cheese donkatsu,
1 spicy donkatsu, 1 donkatsu+kimchi fried rice combo
That's all
[Did I hear that right?]
[All the donkatsu?]
[All of that?]
[All ready to go]
[Is this for a big group?]
[Just by myself]
[Let's see...]
How do I fit this?
There's no more space
I can't even finish one myself
Looks delicious! It's been a while

Almost 2 months
This is a must before eating donkatsu
[Some creamy soup before the meal]
It's delicious
This tastes more like beans Less like a cream
Let's finish it
Cheese one first, right?
I didn't get rice for these 2
Because I don't really eat a lot of rice
I'll order more if I need to
Cheese donkatsu
It's oozing out
It's a lot of cheese
It's good!
The meat is tender and tasty
This brings back memories This is something I had when I was a kid

It's a very nostalgic taste
The sauce is sweet & sour
It's like donkatsu sauce with spaghetti sauce
Cheese Look how it's flowing out
Should I eat these 1 by 1 today?
Instead of switching them up?
I can taste both the soggy and crispy sides of the donkatsu
It's very thick
The sides tend to be thinner
But it's thick here
Tasty
Let's try the regular one now
I was told that this place offers affordable prices
They give you big portions One is huge
Cut the egg
Half cooked

The eggs usually only come out with combos, but they gave them to me because I ordered a lot
I've never had donkatsu with egg before
That's good
That tasted really good with the runny egg yolk
A lot of donkatsu places have good kimchi fried rice
It's so good, I don't know why they don't sell it separately
Only in combos
Some rice
I would devour it if every plate had kimchi fried rice
The crispy ones are good, but I love these ones drenched in sauce
The outside layer of it
Some kimchi with donkatsu
Kimchi donkatsu!
That tasted better than expected
Never thought of eating it like that
I'm trying all these different stuff Egg donkatsu, kimchi donkatsu,

Fish this time
Which one's which?
2 different ones
Maybe just the sauce?
I'll try the donkatsu sauce first
Tastes better than expected
The fish is not dry at all It's very moist, tender, and soft
Delicious This one too
The fish itself is very good
Is it usually this good?
I usually don't eat the fish katsu from school lunches
People always gave those away
I will never give this away
Yum
I'll mix these because I have 2 regular donkatsu
I stabbed my tooth with the fork

It's cost-efficient because the pieces are huge
It's not lunch hours, but there are customers constantly coming in and out
This is too big
It tastes really good with kimchi
As a whole
[That was for 1 person...?]
The regular donkatsu tend to be thin
This one is meaty
A bit of fish katsu
It's gotten cold These would be so much better hot and fresh
Just like how pan-fried fish are good when it's hot off the grill
I'm saving the kimchi fried rice for later
This is the spicy one
Spicy... How spicy?
I'll try this
It's not that...

1 more bite?
Spicy...
It's not that spicy though
Just about right
Mouth feels numb
Spicies than Shin Ramyun, but not Buldak (fire chicken noodles)
My tongue feels numb
Spicy
This is spicier than I thought
I think the fried egg will make it better Or rice?
Those spicy food fanatics would love these because it's a good kind of spiciness
But still, I'm going to dip it in this sauce instead
I'm not good with spicy foods
Fried egg on top will make it alright
It cools down the spiciness
Tastes really good with kimchi

Maybe like Kimchi Pizza Pork? Even though I've never had it before
Sweet potato donkatsu now
This is my favorite I saved it for last
[Filled with golden sweet potato mousse]
I really love these
[I'm gonna fall!!!]
The camera fell
Look at the fillings
[What?!]
This is the best
The sweet potato mousse tastes real
That's so good!
This is the best
Fish katsu
What's this? Doesn't look like sweet potato
It's a regular one

Kimchi fried rice I've been saving it
I think there's garlic sauce on it
I can taste garlic
Kimchi fried rice with strong black pepper flavors And garlic sauce
Fish katsu I wonder what type of sauce this is
Like an orange tartar sauce?
The inside is so moist
Now the sweet potato donkatsu and kimchi fried rice left
I will eat it last because it was the best
1 last piece
1 last bite!
[Finished]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
